title: 1000x Botania
description: Add-on for Botania. Increase the capacity of the Mana Pool by 1000 times.
body:
[Discord](https://discord.gg/qgKEFnf6v8)  
This mod is an add-on for Botania.  
Increase the capacity of the Mana Pool by a 1000 times (Configurable) to allow for the execution of recipes with higher costs.
